description_long: This is a classic football with a traditional black and white panel design, featuring alternating pentagonal and hexagonal shapes. The surface appears to be made of synthetic leather, giving it a slightly matte yet smooth finish, with visible seams outlining each panel. The ball is spherical and well-inflated, suggesting it is ready for play and has not suffered from deformation or excessive wear. The stitching is subtle but visible, indicating a robust construction typical of quality footballs. There are no visible logos, brand markings, or league emblems on the surface, maintaining a clean and generic appearance. The object is of standard size, suitable for use in parks, streets, or sports fields.
description: A classic black and white football with a traditional panel pattern and smooth, matte surface. The ball is well-inflated and shows no visible branding or wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing a centered pentagonal panel surrounded by hexagons, with clear black and white contrast.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the curvature and seam lines between panels, with more hexagons visible.
description_view_2: Opposite face with a similar panel arrangement, emphasizing the symmetry and even inflation.
description_view_3: Another angled view showing the alternating panel pattern and consistent surface texture.
